languages.text: "Почтенный магос". {n}Себериан чуть склоняет голову в знак приветствия.{/n} "Я рад видеть, что служители Омниссии ценят договоренности с домом фон Валанциус".
"Esteemed Magos." {n}Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "I am pleased to see that the servants of the Omnissiah value their cooperation with House von Valancius."
languages.original_text: "Почтенный магос". {n}Себериан чуть склоняет голову в знак приветствия.{/n} "Я рад видеть, что служители Омниссии ценят договоренности с домом фон Валанциус".

traits.locale_text: "Esteemed Magos." {n}Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "I am pleased to see that the servants of the Omnissiah value their cooperation with House von Valancius."

"Esteemed Magos." {n}Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "I am pleased to see that the servants of the Omnissiah value their cooperation with House von Valancius."

languages.text: “尊贵的贤者。”{n}塞贝里安微微颔首致意。{/n}“很高兴看到欧姆尼赛亚的仆人们依然重视与冯·瓦兰修斯家的合作。”
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Magos." {n}Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "I am pleased to see that the servants of the Omnissiah value their cooperation with House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: “尊贵的贤者。”{n}塞贝里安微微颔首致意。{/n}“很高兴看到欧姆尼赛亚的仆人们依然重视与冯·瓦兰修斯家的合作。”

languages.text: « Honorable magos... {n}Seberian incline légèrement la tête en guise de salut.{/n} Je suis ravi de constater que les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie accordent une telle importance à leur partenariat avec la maison von Valancius. »
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Magos." {n}Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "I am pleased to see that the servants of the Omnissiah value their cooperation with House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: « Honorable magos... {n}Seberian incline légèrement la tête en guise de salut.{/n} Je suis ravi de constater que les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie accordent une telle importance à leur partenariat avec la maison von Valancius. »

languages.text: "Saygıdeğer Magos." {n}Seberian, selamlama mahiyetinde başını hafifçe eğiyor.{/n} "Hermesih'in hizmetkârlarının von Valancius Hanesi ile olan iş birliklerine değer verdiğini görmekten bilhassa memnun oldum."
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Magos." {n}Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "I am pleased to see that the servants of the Omnissiah value their cooperation with House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: "Saygıdeğer Magos." {n}Seberian, selamlama mahiyetinde başını hafifçe eğiyor.{/n} "Hermesih'in hizmetkârlarının von Valancius Hanesi ile olan iş birliklerine değer verdiğini görmekten bilhassa memnun oldum."

languages.text: «Estimado magos». {n}Seberian inclina la cabeza ligeramente a modo de saludo.{/n} «Me alegro de ver que los siervos del Omnissiah saben valorar la cooperación de la casa von Valancius».
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Magos." {n}Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "I am pleased to see that the servants of the Omnissiah value their cooperation with House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: «Estimado magos». {n}Seberian inclina la cabeza ligeramente a modo de saludo.{/n} «Me alegro de ver que los siervos del Omnissiah saben valorar la cooperación de la casa von Valancius».

languages.text: "Geschätzter Magos." {n}Seberian neigt grüßend seinen Kopf.{/n} "Ich freue mich, zu sehen, dass die Diener des Omnissiah ihre Kooperation mit Haus von Valancius schätzen."
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Magos." {n}Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "I am pleased to see that the servants of the Omnissiah value their cooperation with House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: "Geschätzter Magos." {n}Seberian neigt grüßend seinen Kopf.{/n} "Ich freue mich, zu sehen, dass die Diener des Omnissiah ihre Kooperation mit Haus von Valancius schätzen."

languages.text: 「尊敬するマゴス様たち。」{n}シベリアは軽く頭を下げて挨拶する。{/n}「オムニシアのしもべがフォン・ヴァランシウス家との協力に重きを置いているのを見て、私は喜びます。」
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Magos." {n}Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "I am pleased to see that the servants of the Omnissiah value their cooperation with House von Valancius."
